description: MainActivity class for an Android app demonstrating biometric-authenticated login workflows, including login, lock/unlock, protected endpoint calls, logout, and status logging. It manages UI interactions, observes authentication state, and prompts biometric authentication as needed.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: An activity managing biometric login, session state, UI updates, and user interactions for authentication workflows.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, sets the content view, binds views, wires click listeners, and starts observing auth state and logs.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles activity resumption: locks the session if backgrounded and prompts for biometric unlock if necessary.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels ongoing coroutines when activity is destroyed.

methods.name: bindViews
methods.description: Associates UI components with their layout counterparts.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets click listeners for login, lock, unlock, call protected endpoint, logout, and clear log buttons.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects updates to authentication state and updates UI accordingly, auto-prompting biometric unlock when locked.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Updates status log UI with latest log lines.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables UI buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Checks biometric availability and prompts for biometric authentication if session is locked and biometric is available.
